name: garcon
description: A cross-platform agentic coding UI for Claude Code, Codex, and Opencode

scripts.install: bun install --cwd server && bun install --cwd web
scripts.build-exe: bun run check && bun run test && bun run build && bun run build-exe:compile && bun run build-exe:smoke
scripts.start: bun run build && bun run server
scripts.test: for f in server/**/__tests__/*.test.js; do bun test "$f" || exit 1; done && bun run --cwd web test
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd server typecheck && bun run --cwd web check

author: Alex Lau <github@alau.ca>
